---
title: "Quarto Guide Preview"
subtitle: "Reset from zero using the official presentations guide"
format: revealjs
---

# Creating Slides

## Basic Slide

This deck uses Quarto's native presentation syntax.

- Slides are created with headings
- `##` creates regular slides
- `#` creates section title slides

## Slide Without A Title

---

This slide is separated with a horizontal rule rather than a heading.

# Incremental Lists

## Incremental Example

::: {.incremental}
- First point appears first
- Second point appears next
- Third point appears last
:::

## Non-Incremental Example

::: {.nonincremental}
- This list stays visible all at once
- Even if the presentation uses incremental lists elsewhere
:::

# Multiple Columns

## Column Layout

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="40%"}
### Left Column

- Short point
- Short point
- Short point
:::

::: {.column width="60%"}
### Right Column

This is the native Quarto / Revealjs columns syntax from the presentations guide.
:::

::::

# Speaker Notes

## Slide With Notes

This slide has presenter notes.

::: {.notes}
Mention how notes are opened in Reveal speaker view.
:::

# Slide Backgrounds

## Color Background {background-color="seagreen"}

This slide uses a background color attribute.

## Image Background {background-image="../_format/assets/Logo_UCAB_1.png" background-size="220px" background-repeat="repeat" background-color="white"}

This slide uses a repeated image background.

## {background-color="whitesmoke"}

This is a background-only slide with no title.

# Next Step

## Lecture Template Baseline

The active template is now minimal on purpose.

Start Lecture 01 only after the presentation structure feels right in this preview.
